jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Babyoye - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Babyoye. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Mysuru-based team.

About Babyoye:
Babyoye is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Babyoye!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
